summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Seller Name Privacy Toggle feature. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend UI toggle works correctly with proper state management, toast notifications, and privacy banner display.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user, created TEST_ prefixed listings for privacy testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seller Name Privacy Toggle feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoint PUT /api/users/privacy-settings toggles is_real_name_private field. GET /api/users/{user_id} returns display_name and name_hidden based on privacy + friendship status. Marketplace listings (GET /api/marketplace/listings and GET /api/marketplace/listings/{id}) respect seller privacy settings. Frontend Settings page has working toggle with data-testid='toggle-real-name-privacy'. Privacy banner appears when enabled. Username shown instead of real name when privacy is ON for non-friends.

feature_1_privacy_settings_endpoint.details: PUT /api/users/privacy-settings exists, requires auth, toggles is_real_name_private field correctly

feature_2_get_user_with_privacy.details: GET /api/users/{user_id} returns display_name (username when private) and name_hidden=true for non-friends

feature_3_marketplace_listings_privacy.details: GET /api/marketplace/listings returns seller info with display_name and name_hidden respecting privacy

feature_4_single_listing_privacy.details: GET /api/marketplace/listings/{id} returns seller info respecting privacy settings

feature_5_frontend_toggle_ui.details: Settings page has working privacy toggle with proper state management and toast notifications

feature_6_privacy_banner.details: Privacy banner shows when enabled with explanation text

feature_7_username_display.details: Username shown instead of real name in marketplace listings when privacy is ON

feature_8_self_view.details: User can always see their own real name regardless of privacy setting

feature_9_friends_endpoint.details: GET /api/users/{user_id}/friends endpoint exists and returns list of mutual followers
